name: templates-for-ai-project
description: Full stack шаблон: docs-first + OpenSpec + Clean Architecture + FSD + Cursor AI

scripts.likec4:gen: likec4 gen mermaid -o docs/architecture/diagram/generated/mermaid docs/architecture/diagram && likec4 gen dot -o docs/architecture/diagram/generated/dot docs/architecture/diagram && likec4 export json -o docs/architecture/diagram/generated docs/architecture/diagram
scripts.likec4:build: likec4 build -o docs/architecture/diagram/generated/site -t "Зелёный квартал — C4" docs/architecture/diagram
